ddls:
CREATE TABLE "building_data" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the building */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Outdoor air drybulb temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Outdoor air relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  "indoor_air_quality" REAL /* Indoor air quality index */,
  "lighting_level" REAL /* Current lighting level */,
  "security_status" TEXT /* Current security status */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Water usage data */,
  "waste_generation" REAL /* Waste generation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id", "timestep")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_data" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zone */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Zone air temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Zone air relative humidity */,
  "heating_setpoint" REAL /* Heating setpoint temperature */,
  "cooling_setpoint" REAL /* Cooling setpoint temperature */,
  "air_quality" REAL /* Air quality in the zone */,
  "lighting_level" REAL /* Lighting level in the zone */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Occupancy status of the zone */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id", "timestep")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the data */,
  "thermal_comfort" REAL /* Thermal comfort mean radiant temperature */,
  "people_count" INTEGER /* People count */,
  "air_quality" REAL /* Air quality data from sensors */,
  "lighting_level" REAL /* Lighting level data from sensors */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level data from sensors */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id", "timestep"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy data */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the data */,
  "hvac_demand" REAL /* Facility total HVAC electricity demand rate */,
  "lighting_demand" REAL /* Electricity demand for lighting */,
  "water_heating_demand" REAL /* Electricity demand for water heating */,
  "security_system_demand" REAL /* Electricity demand for the security system */,
  "total_demand" REAL /* Total electricity demand for the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id", "timestep")
)

CREATE TABLE "setpoints" (
  "setpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setpoint */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the data */,
  "heating_setpoint" REAL /* Heating setpoint temperature */,
  "cooling_setpoint" REAL /* Cooling setpoint temperature */,
  "lighting_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for lighting levels */,
  "air_quality_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for air quality */,
  "noise_level_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for noise levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setpoint_id", "timestep")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the building */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the building */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last building inspection */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the zone */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the zone */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the zone */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last zone inspection */,
  "occupancy_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy capacity of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the energy data
Facility total HVAC electricity demand rate
Electricity demand for the security system
Total electricity demand for the building
Timestamp of the user's last login
Date of the last building inspection
Number of floors in the building
Date of the last zone inspection
Maximum occupancy capacity of the zone
